name: Open-Meteo (free, no key)
description: Current conditions and short-term forecast from Open-Meteo. Free, no API key required. Supports city names and US zip codes.
examples: is it going to rain today
how cold is it in Tokyo right now

user.label: Default location
user.description: City or US zip used when you ask about weather without naming a place (e.g. 'is it going to rain today'). Required — without this the skill cannot answer location-less queries.
